result.stdout:
Available commands are:

    list        - List nuget packages from selected solution & highlight the outdated packages
    import      - Import nuget package references of selected project.
    export      - Export nuget package references of selected project.
    remove      - remove specified nuget packages from selected solution.
    update      - Update nuget packages from selected solution & highlight the outdated packages
    clone       - copy nuget packages from selected solution & install to the target project.

    help <name> - For help with one of the above commands

commands.payload:
Available commands are:

    list        - List nuget packages from selected solution & highlight the outdated packages
    import      - Import nuget package references of selected project.
    export      - Export nuget package references of selected project.
    remove      - remove specified nuget packages from selected solution.
    update      - Update nuget packages from selected solution & highlight the outdated packages
    clone       - copy nuget packages from selected solution & install to the target project.

    help <name> - For help with one of the above commands

result.stdout:
Extra parameters specified: --help

'clone' - copy nuget packages from selected solution & install to the target project.

Expected usage: NuSightConsole clone <options> 
<options> available:
  -s, --source=VALUE         source project path
  -t, --target=VALUE         target .csproj path
  -d, --display              run install command to clone packages to your
                               target csproj
  -l, --latest               using latest version

Extra parameters specified: --help

'clone' - copy nuget packages from selected solution & install to the target project.

Expected usage: NuSightConsole clone <options> 
<options> available:
  -s, --source=VALUE         source project path
  -t, --target=VALUE         target .csproj path
  -d, --display              run install command to clone packages to your
                               target csproj
  -l, --latest               using latest version

result.stdout:
Extra parameters specified: --help

'import' - Import nuget package references of selected project.

Expected usage: NuSightConsole import <options> 
<options> available:
  -s, --solution=VALUE       select solution path
  -f, --file=VALUE           saved nuget reference json file path
  -d, --display              display 'install commands' only for selected file

commands.payload:
Extra parameters specified: --help

'import' - Import nuget package references of selected project.

Expected usage: NuSightConsole import <options> 
<options> available:
  -s, --solution=VALUE       select solution path
  -f, --file=VALUE           saved nuget reference json file path
  -d, --display              display 'install commands' only for selected file

result.stdout:
Extra parameters specified: --help

'list' - List nuget packages from selected solution & highlight the outdated packages

Expected usage: NuSightConsole list <options> 
<options> available:
  -s, --solution=VALUE       solution path
  -i, --inconsistency        check package with inconsistent versions, if true
                               errors out
  -o, --outdated             check any outdated packages, if true errors out.
  -p, --prereleased          check any pre-release packages, if true errors out.
  -u, --unpublished          check any unpublished packages, if true errors out.

  -u, --unpublished          check any unpublished packages, if true errors out.

result.stdout:
Extra parameters specified: --help

'remove' - remove specified nuget packages from selected solution.

Expected usage: NuSightConsole remove <options> 
<options> available:
  -s, --solution=VALUE       solution path
  -p, --package=VALUE        select package name
  -d, --display              display 'remove commands' only for selected
                               package.
